prestazioni: AMG M256 E30 DE 30 LA 4.0L inline-6 hybrid powertrain with a custom PWR Racing intercooled turbo system featuring a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger, billet compressor wheel, and 1.22 A/R turbine housing, pushing 950 HP at 2.2 bar boost with a custom ECU flash via HP Tuners VCM Suite for Mercedes-Benz MEVD17.2.6 control units

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič with 3.5-inch diameter piping, quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips, and a valved bypass for track-only backpressure reduction, paired with a custom secondary catalytic converter delete using a GESI high-flow metallic core unit for emissions compliance in select regions

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom spring rates (18kg/mm front, 22kg/mm rear), and adjustable top mounts with spherical bearings, paired with a H&R monoball subframe kit and polyamide bushings for chassis rigidity enhancement
estetica: Rocket Bunny VGT widebody kit (Pandem Design) with carbon-fiber overfenders, custom front splitter with integrated dive planes, and a 3-piece adjustable rear wing with Gurney flap, all finished in Selenite Grey with matte clear coat

BBS FI-R 20x11.5 ET15 (front) and 20x12.5 ET5 (rear) forged wheels with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30/20 front, 325/30/20 rear), paired with AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm CCM-R discs and titanium pistons

Custom carbon-fiber interior by Status Gruppe featuring a full roll cage with integrated fire suppression system (Sparco Pro 2000), Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a digital dash cluster by AIM MXS Strada with integrated data logging for lap timing and telemetry
